reasoning: The FedRAMP SC-7 control focuses on boundary protection, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to network security and access controls. NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce ingress and egress restrictions, ensuring that pods are not exposed to the internet unless explicitly allowed. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer service types and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress controllers are critical for securing boundaries in Kubernetes.
title: Boundary Protection
